tagline: Two days to understand how capital moves across Latin America
heroLead: Education, debate and real connection between investors, managers and founders. Six asset classes in one conversation.

about.title: The event
about.lead: Not a mass event. A carefully built room.
about.body: Two days in Medellín where 300 investors, family offices, fund managers and founders with an active mandate come together. Six asset classes in the same room: real estate, venture capital, private equity, sports, private debt and emerging sectors. No improvised banners. No observers. Every seat is curated.

whyNow.title: Geopolitics
whyNow.body: Nearshoring is redrawing the capital map. LatAm went from periphery to center of thesis for global funds.

whyNow.title: Capital
whyNow.body: High rates pushed investors back to real assets. Real estate, private debt and sports are gaining traction.

whyNow.title: Medellín
whyNow.body: The city now hosts the most active ecosystem in the region: founders, family offices, fund managers and developers.

thesis.title: Real Estate
thesis.desc: The Latin American wealth core. Multifamily, BTR and cross-border vehicles.

thesis.title: Venture Capital
thesis.desc: Early and growth in LatAm. Active funds, disciplined tickets, founders executing.

thesis.title: Private Equity
thesis.desc: Mid-market buyouts, co-investments and secondaries for family offices and HNWIs.

thesis.title: Sports
thesis.desc: Investing in athletes, clubs and careers. A young asset class with asymmetric returns.

thesis.title: Private Debt
thesis.desc: Direct lending and venture debt with attractive yields in hard currency.

thesis.title: Emerging Sectors
thesis.desc: Tokenization, distributed energy and new alternative vehicles.

experience.title: Stage
experience.desc: 8 keynotes and tight panels, no filler. Everything said is actionable.

experience.title: Networking
experience.desc: Assigned tables, 1:1 deal rooms and a committee making the introductions that matter.

experience.title: Expo
experience.desc: 30+ curated booths. Real estate, funds and projects in one room.

experience.title: Premium
experience.desc: Welcome cocktail, themed-table lunches and an invitation-only closing dinner.

whyLinkU.title: Real curation
whyLinkU.body: Every attendee passes the committee. If you don't add to the room, you don't get in.

whyLinkU.title: Multi-asset for real
whyLinkU.body: Six asset classes in the same space. Cross-pollination is the product.

whyLinkU.title: No observers
whyLinkU.body: Only people with mandate, ticket or project. Zero tourists.

whyLinkU.title: Right size
whyLinkU.body: 300 people. Enough to close deals, not enough to get lost in.

whyLinkU.title: Run by a fund
whyLinkU.body: LinkU Ventures organizes. The lens is that of an investor, not an event producer.

whyLinkU.title: LatAm at the center
whyLinkU.body: Medellín as the meeting point. Without pretending the world revolves around Bogotá or São Paulo.

finalCTA.title: October 2026.
finalCTA.highlight: Medellín decides who's in the room.
